name: Libromancer Agent
name_jp: リブロマンサー・エージェント
desc: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 "Libromancer" card in your GY, except "Libromancer Agent"; add it to your hand, then if you added a Spell/Trap by this effect, place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Agent" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 "Libromancer" card in your GY, except "Libromancer Agent"; add it to your hand, then if you added a Spell/Trap by this effect, place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Agent" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 "Libromancer" card in your GY, except "Libromancer Agent"; add it to your hand, then if you added a Spell/Trap by this effect, place 1 card from your hand on the bottom of the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Agent" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Places cards from the player's hand on the bottom of the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
